models.heading: Power Weeder MT900GA-208CC – High Performance Farming Machine
models.subHeading:
A 7 HP power weeder is an agricultural machine commonly used for the practices of tilling, weeding and preparation of soil. It involves rotating blades, which help in penetrating the soil, uprooting the weeding and breaking the compacted soil. The machine either uses a petrol or gasoline engine, which makes them work efficiently in crop lands, vegetable fields, etc. It is generally a lightweight machine designed to be used easily, having adjustable blades, so that farmers can set the depth and width, as some crops may require shallow tilling of soil, while others may need deep tilling. 

 The MT900GA‑208CC is designed to make weeding and soil preparation faster, easier and more efficient for medium and large farms. Its 208 cc engine, robust build, and wide working width make it perfect for vegetable plots, and commercial agriculture. Built with the demand of the Indian Agriculture environment the MT900GA-208CC with solid tyre is an ideal pick for Indian farmers who are looking for strength and increased productivity in daily and challenging field tasks.
features: Motor de gasolina de 4 tiempos de alta eficiencia
Transmisión por correa para mayor durabilidad
Fresas de acero templado para mayor resistencia
featuresEn: 7 HP high performance engine for efficient field operation
Deep tilling capability for better soil aeration
Wide working width for faster soil coverage
Adjustable handlebar for improved comfort and control
Large fuel tank for longer uninterrupted working hours
Oil bath air filter for engine protection

models.heading: Power Weeder MT900GA1-208CC – Efficient & Reliable Agriculture Tool
models.subHeading: A 7 HP power weeder is an agricultural machine commonly used for the practices of tilling, weeding and preparation of soil. They're a good switch from the labour-intensive manual weeding to saving time, enhancing output and yield. The 7 HP denotes the engine power of the machine, which is the horsepower, making it durable enough to handle tough soil conditions while manageable for the farmers to operate fully by themselves.
features: Motor de gasolina de 4 tiempos de alta eficiencia
Adjustable handlebar for better comfort during long use
Suitable for small and medium scale farming operations
Fresas de acero templado para mayor resistencia
featuresEn: Gear transmission system for smooth and efficient control
Adjustable handlebar for better comfort during long use
Suitable for small and medium scale farming operations
Easy movement with strong and stable wheel support
Efficient soil tilling with deep working capability

faqs.question: ¿Qué tipo de combustible utiliza este motocultor?
faqs.questionEn: How many types of Power Weeder models are available?
faqs.answer: Este motocultor utiliza gasolina sin plomo de 87 octanos o superior. El motor es de 4 tiempos, por lo que NO requiere mezcla de aceite con la gasolina.
faqs.answerEn: There are 2 type of power weeder models available which are: MT900GA-208CC - Solid tyre, MT900GA1-208CC - Tube tyre

faqs.question: ¿Cuál es el ancho de trabajo máximo?
faqs.questionEn: Is it suitable for all types of soil?
faqs.answer: El ancho de trabajo es de 36 cm, ideal para trabajos en espacios medianos y huertos familiares.
faqs.answerEn: Yes, it is designed to work in different soil conditions, including hard and uneven land, making it suitable for various farming needs.

faqs.question: ¿Qué mantenimiento requiere?
faqs.questionEn: What is the difference between solid tyres and tube tyres in power weeders?
faqs.answer: Mantenimiento básico incluye: cambio de aceite cada 25 horas de uso, limpieza del filtro de aire, revisión de bujías y lubricación de puntos móviles según manual del usuario.
faqs.answerEn: Solid tyres are puncture-resistant and involve less maintenance, while tube (inflatable) tyres provide better absorption of shock and smoother movement.

faqs.question: ¿Incluye garantía?
faqs.questionEn: Warranty period of Mechnova Power Weeder?
faqs.answer: Sí, incluye garantía de 12 meses por defectos de fabricación. La garantía cubre motor, transmisión y componentes principales.
faqs.answerEn: Mechnova power weeder comes with a warranty of 6 months

faqs.question: ¿Es adecuado para terrenos duros?
faqs.questionEn: Is the Mechnova Power Weeder suitable for small farms?
faqs.answer: Sí, con su motor de 7HP y fresas de acero templado, puede trabajar eficientemente en terrenos compactados y duros.
faqs.answerEn: Yes, Mechnova Power Weeders are specially designed for small to medium-sized farms and are a perfect fit to operate between crop rows and in tough soil conditions.

models.heading: Brush  Cutter  MBC37SC  –  Efficient  4-Stroke  Grass  Cutting Machine
models.subHeading:
The  MBC37SC  is  a  reliable  and  efficient  machine  designed  for  cutting  grass,  light  bushes, and weeds  with  absolute  ease.  It  runs  a  4-stroke  engine,  which  delivers  1.35  HP  power  output, making  it  suitable  for  agricultural  activities.  Unlike  traditional  machines,  this  machine  offers  a 4-stroke  engine,  which  offers  smoother  operation,  less  vibration,  and  better  fuel  efficiency.  This makes it a perfect fit for farmers who want less noise and effort with consistent performance. 

 The  machine  is  well  designed  to  give  better  control  and  reduce  fatigue  during  the  operations.  It has  a  D-shaped  handle  that  provides  a  firm  grip,  which  makes  it  easier  for  the  user  to  guide  the machine  and  control  it  while  working.  The  machine  is  capable  of  handling  regular  usage  without any  wear  and  tear.  As  the  machine  has  a  manual  recoil  start  system,  the  machine  gets  started quickly without any complication.
models.nextSubHeading: Overall,  the  MBC37SC  brush  cutter  is  a  good  option  for  a  routine  grass-cutting  machine.  The machine  is  an  ideal  pick  for  farmers  who  work  on  small  farms  and  for  garden  use,  as  it  provides steady  performance.  If  you  are  looking  for  a  machine  that  is  easy  to  manage  and  delivers consistent results, this brush cutter is a practical and efficient choice.
featuresEn: Comfortable D-shaped handle for better grip and contro
4-stroke engine for smoother and quieter operation
Strong shaft design for stable and steady performance
Compact design for easy handling and movement
Reinforced exhaust for improved durability and life
Easy recoil start system for quick machine startup

faqs.answerEn: In  comparison  to  a  2-stroke  engine,  a  4-stroke  engine  requires  less  maintenance  and  cleaning work.  Its  engine  runs  smoothly  without  any  interruption,  which  is  perfect  for  cutting  grass, weeds, and small plants on farms.

faqs.questionEn: What is the warranty period of the Mechnova Brush Cutter?
faqs.answerEn: The Mechnova Brush Cutter comes with a warranty of 6 months.

faqs.questionEn: Can the machine be used for long working hours comfortably?
faqs.answerEn: Yes,  the  D-handle  design  helps  in  maintaining  a  firm  grip  and  reduces  strain  on  the  hands, making it easier to use for longer durations.

faqs.questionEn: Can the machine cut thick grass?
faqs.answerEn: Yes, it  can  cut  dense  grass  and  light  bushes  effectively,  making  it  suitable  for  regular  field  and garden maintenance.
